name: Tavern Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the flour and nutmeg.
2. Add the butter and mix until the mixture is crumbly.
3. Gradually add the remaining ingredients; mix well.
4. Knead the dough into a smooth texture.
5. Roll the dough thin and cut into small round shapes.
6. Bake at 450°F until light brown.
